moments.title: Download Festival Recap
moments.blurb: The UK's biggest rock and metal festival, Download, wrapped up yesterday, June 14, at Donington Park, leaving thousands of fans buzzing from four days of heavy music and iconic performances.

angles.name: Best Bits
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Download? What was your highlight from the weekend at Donington? The mud, the music, or that one epic set?

angles.name: Post-Festival Blues
angles.copy: The tents are packed, the riffs have faded. Who's feeling the Download Festival blues today? Tell us what you're missing most!

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival returns this Thursday, June 18, bringing a massive line-up of rock and pop acts to Seaclose Park for a four-day celebration of music.

angles.name: Festival Bound
angles.copy: Who's heading to the Isle of Wight this weekend? Gates open Thursday for another epic festival! What act are you most excited for?

angles.name: Island Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for island vibes and huge tunes! The Isle of Wight Festival is almost here. What's your go-to festival anthem?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Starts in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green lights up this Friday, June 19, as TRNSMT Festival begins, featuring a stellar line-up of international artists across three days in the heart of Scotland.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Ready
angles.copy: TRNSMT is almost here! Glasgow Green is getting ready for a massive weekend of music. Who are you buzzing to see live?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Fever
angles.copy: The countdown to TRNSMT is on! Get ready for the biggest party in Scotland this weekend. What's your top tip for surviving a city festival?

moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival continues this week, running until June 19, with a series of intimate concerts in the stunning historic setting.

angles.name: Palace Gigs
angles.copy: Live music in a palace? Yes please! The Hampton Court Palace Festival is still bringing incredible acts to a truly unique venue this week.

angles.name: Historic Harmony
angles.copy: Soaking up the atmosphere at Hampton Court Palace Festival. Who's been to a gig in a more stunning location?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Build-Up
moments.blurb: The tennis world is gearing up for Wimbledon 2026, which begins on June 29. The official ATP rankings for seeding will be confirmed on June 22, adding to the anticipation.

angles.name: Grass Court Season
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are almost on standby! The grass court season is in full swing, leading up to Wimbledon kicking off on June 29.

angles.name: Seeding Speculation
angles.copy: Who's going to be top seed at Wimbledon this year? The rankings for the draw are set to be confirmed next week. Any predictions?

moments.title: Queen's Club Championships
moments.blurb: The HSBC Championships at Queen's Club, a key warm-up for Wimbledon, is currently underway in London, running until June 21.

angles.name: Queen's Action
angles.copy: The Queen's Club Championships are serving up some fantastic tennis in London this week! Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: Wimbledon Prep
angles.copy: Crucial Wimbledon prep happening at Queen's Club right now. The big names are out on the grass. Catch the action before the finals this weekend!

moments.title: Lexus Eastbourne Open
moments.blurb: The Lexus Eastbourne Open, another significant grass-court tournament, starts on June 20 at Devonshire Park, featuring top players ahead of Wimbledon.

angles.name: Eastbourne Countdown
angles.copy: More grass-court goodness! The Lexus Eastbourne Open kicks off Friday. Who's excited for more tennis action on the south coast?

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: The road to Wimbledon runs through Eastbourne this week! Another chance to see the pros on grass before the big one. Who's playing?

moments.title: Paul McCartney's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, the legendary Beatle and solo artist, turns 84 on June 18, continuing his incredible legacy in music.

angles.name: Macca's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 84th to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney on June 18! What's your all-time favourite song from a true legend?

angles.name: Beatle Legend
angles.copy: From The Beatles to Wings and beyond, Paul McCartney's influence is unmatched. Celebrating his 84th birthday this week!

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Iconic singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for his smooth ballads and funk hits, celebrates his 77th birthday on June 20.

angles.name: Hello, is it his birthday?
angles.copy: All Night Long we'll be celebrating Lionel Richie's 77th birthday on June 20! What's your favourite Lionel tune?

angles.name: Easy Like Sunday Morning
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the incredible Lionel Richie this Friday! His hits are truly timeless.

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: The enigmatic and influential singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey turns 41 on June 21, known for her cinematic sound and melancholic lyrics.

angles.name: Queen of Melancholy
angles.copy: Happy 41st birthday to the one and only Lana Del Rey on June 21! What's your favourite track from the queen of cinematic pop?

angles.name: Iconic Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating Lana Del Rey's 41st this Sunday! Her unique sound has defined a generation. What's the first song that comes to mind?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for her vibrant personality and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday on June 22.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper on June 22! Her music still makes us want to dance. What's your favourite Cyndi hit?

angles.name: True Colours
angles.copy: Celebrating the legend that is Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday this Monday! Her 'True Colours' shine as bright as ever.

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, turns 33 on June 26.

angles.name: Thank U, Next Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday to the phenomenal Ariana Grande on June 26! From Nickelodeon to global pop sensation, what's your favourite era?

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Celebrating Ariana Grande's 33rd this Thursday! Her incredible vocal range and hits have made her a true pop icon.

moments.title: Summer Solstice
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, falls on Saturday, June 21, bringing with it the official start of astronomical summer.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Soak it up! Saturday, June 21, is the Summer Solstice, the longest day of the year. How are you making the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Summer Begins
angles.copy: Astronomical summer officially begins this weekend with the Solstice! Time for sunshine, good vibes, and great music.

moments.title: Outbreak Fest Coming Up
moments.blurb: Outbreak Fest, a hardcore, punk, and alternative music festival, is set for June 26-28 in Manchester, promising a high-energy weekend for fans.

angles.name: Hardcore Countdown
angles.copy: Get ready, Manchester! Outbreak Fest is just around the corner, June 26-28. Who's heading to the BEC Arena for some serious noise?

angles.name: Alternative Anthems
angles.copy: Outbreak Fest is bringing the best in hardcore, punk, and alternative music to Manchester next week. What band are you most hyped for?
